title: Memory Layer Architecture
brief: Technical infographic showing a four-layer memory hierarchy for AI agent self-evolution. Bottom to top: L1 Working Memory (session-level, ephemeral), L2 Episodic Memory (cross-session, SQLite + FTS5 retrieval), L3 Structured Knowledge (validated docs + rules, Git-tracked markdown), L4 Procedural Skills (executable SKILL.md + scripts). Show these as ascending horizontal layers with upward arrows indicating the promotion path, with gate conditions like 'reused ≥3 times' between layers. Clean soft-tech diagram style, Chinese/English bilingual labels, suitable for mobile-width reading in a WeChat article.
prompt:
Create a polished article illustration titled 'Memory Layer Architecture'. Diagram type: knowledge card. Use a soft technical diagram, subtle dashed containers, layered modules, light academic visual language. Make it suitable for insertion into engineering notes or a design document. Prefer a clear information hierarchy with section titles, concise Chinese/English labels, short notes, arrows, grouped modules, and strong readability. Avoid dense paragraph blocks. Language mode: zh-en. Target aspect ratio preset: auto. Mode: text-only. Content brief:
